highlights.text: Hanoi (2N) → Halong Bay (2N) → Da Nang/Hoi An (2N) ultra-luxury circuit
VIP Hanoi arrival & exclusive heritage private tour
Ultra-luxury Halong Bay cruise with spa & gourmet dining
Hoi An private discovery & farewell gala dinner

itinerary.title: Luxury Vietnam Tour
itinerary.tagline: Hanoi • Ultra-Luxury Halong Bay Cruise • Da Nang • Exclusive Heritage Tours
itinerary.overview: Indulge in the absolute height of sophistication across Vietnam with TRAGUIN's curated luxury expedition. From opulent five-star stays and private cruises to exclusive cultural tours and premium concierge service, this journey is designed for the discerning traveler — ensuring unforgettable memories in ultimate luxury.
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 06 Nights / 07 Days Vietnam package (VN-004): Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi, elite Halong Bay cruise, and InterContinental Danang Resort.

highlights.text: Hoi An Private Discovery & Gala Dinner

days.title: VIP Arrival & Hanoi Luxury
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. VIP chauffeur transfer to your world-class hotel. Evening gourmet welcome dinner overlooking the historic city center.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP chauffeur airport reception
Evening Experience: Gourmet welcome dinner
Overnight Stay: Hanoi (Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi)
Meals Included: Welcome Dinner

days.title: Exclusive Hanoi Heritage
days.description: Private guided tour of Hanoi's most prestigious historical landmarks, providing a rich exclusive experience of Vietnamese culture.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private guided Hanoi heritage tour
Overnight Stay: Hanoi (Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Ultra-Luxury Cruise Commencement
days.description: Transfer to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury cruise vessel. Experience gourmet dining while sailing through breathtaking limestone islands.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP transfer to Halong Bay, elite cruise boarding
Overnight Stay: Halong Bay (Elite Cruise Vessel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Cruise Dinner

days.title: Halong Bay Serenity
days.description: Enjoy personalized activities, spa therapies, and gourmet relaxation aboard your vessel, surrounded by stunning scenery.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Personalized cruise activities and spa therapies
Overnight Stay: Halong Bay (Elite Cruise Vessel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Cruise Dining

days.title: Flight to Da Nang
days.description: Morning brunch on the cruise. Private transfer to airport for your flight to Da Nang. Check into an ultra-luxury coastal resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cruise brunch, domestic flight to Da Nang, VIP resort transfer
Overnight Stay: Da Nang/Hoi An (InterContinental Danang Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Cruise Brunch

days.title: Hoi An Private Discovery
days.description: Private guided exploration of Hoi An's Ancient Town, focusing on premium crafts and historical charm. Evening farewell gala dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private Hoi An Ancient Town tour
Evening Experience: Farewell gala dinner
Overnight Stay: Da Nang/Hoi An (InterContinental Danang Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gala Dinner

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast. VIP chauffeur transfer to the airport, concluding your premium Vietnam luxury expedition.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP chauffeur airport transfer
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in ultra-luxury hotels and elite cruise across Hanoi, Halong Bay, and Da Nang/Hoi An
VIP chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Ultra-luxury Halong Bay cruise with spa therapies and gourmet dining
Private Hanoi heritage tour and Hoi An private discovery
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated luxury travel concierge support
International airfare and Vietnam entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
